summary: Pre-production regression test PASSED. Complete E2E smoke test across all 4 user roles (Admin, Organizer, Participant, Provider) and all major pages. All dashboards load correctly, navigation works, no critical console errors, no broken UI.

console_warnings.issue: Non-critical chart dimension warnings when charts render in collapsed containers

public_pages.home_page: PASS - Hero visible, featured events displayed, navigation works
public_pages.event_detail: PASS - Detail page, races section, register button, community section all visible

organizer_dashboard.create_event_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens, form fields visible

protected_pages.checkin_page: PASS - Event list visible, progress stats, scan zone working
protected_pages.rfid_page: PASS - Catalog with 6 equipment items, cart button visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-production regression test complete. All 4 roles tested, all dashboards functional, all protected pages accessible. Only non-critical console warnings are from Recharts chart dimension warnings in collapsed containers. Invoice PDF generation verified working. App is production-ready.
